name: Do siding contractors usually require a deposit?

mainEntity.name: Do siding contractors usually require a deposit?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can usually ask for a deposit schedule, but it should be spelled out in the contract and tied to the work to be completed. Be cautious if a contractor wants a large upfront payment without a written agreement.
acceptedAnswer.description: Some do, but it should be written into the contract. Avoid large upfront payments without clear terms.

description: Some do, but it should be written into the contract. Avoid large upfront payments without clear terms.
